faqs.question: What are the signs of a pantry pest infestation in my West Farms apartment?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small moths flying around your kitchen, webbing in food packages, tiny beetles in flour or cereal, small holes in packaging, and larvae or cocoons in cupboard corners. You may also notice a musty odor in pantry areas or see adult insects near windows and light fixtures.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide pantry pest control service in West Farms?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to West Farms residents. Most pantry pest treatments take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation. Our technicians will arrive with all necessary equipment and products to eliminate your pantry pest problem efficiently.

faqs.question: Are your pantry pest treatments safe for families and pets in West Farms homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products specifically designed for kitchen environments that are safe around children and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians focus on targeted treatments, proper ventilation, and thorough cleanup to ensure your family's safety throughout the process.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 pantry pest control service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection of all food storage areas, identification of pest species, treatment of infested areas with professional-grade products, removal of contaminated materials, prevention recommendations, and a follow-up visit if needed. The price varies based on the size of your space and severity of infestation.
